title: Mnemosyne Isolate Manifest
description: Schema for a single line of `manifest.mnemosyne`. The file is JSONL: the first non-blank line MUST be a header (kind="header"); every subsequent non-blank line MUST be a session entry (kind="session"). Produced by `mnemosyne publish --isolate` and consumed to dedup uploads across publishes.

header.description: First line of manifest.mnemosyne. Describes the run that produced the dataset and totals across all session entries.

version.description: Manifest schema version. Bumped when Header/Entry field semantics change in a breaking way.

exported_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC) for when the manifest was rendered.

pipeline_fingerprint.description: Fingerprint identifying the redaction pipeline version, e.g. "v1:<detector-version>".

config_fingerprint.description: SHA-256 fingerprint of the user's redaction config (custom_redactions + custom_handles), formatted as "sha256:<hex>".

session_count.description: Number of session entries that follow this header.

record_count.description: Total canonical records observed across all sessions during the run that produced this manifest.

attach_images.description: Whether inline image attachments (base64 data URLs) were retained in the uploaded session files.

session.description: Entry describing one session file uploaded alongside the manifest.

file.description: Path to the session file inside the dataset repo, using forward slashes (e.g. "claudecode/session.jsonl").

format.description: Origin format of the session file. Matches the mnemosyne source origin.

source_hash.description: SHA-256 of the raw source file bytes before redaction, as "sha256:<hex>".

redaction_key.description: Opaque key identifying the redaction posture applied to this file. Format: "<manifest-version>:<pipeline-fingerprint>:<config-fingerprint>:<keep|strip>-images". Republishing with a different key forces re-upload.

redacted_hash.description: SHA-256 of the post-redaction file bytes that are uploaded to the dataset, as "sha256:<hex>".

lines.description: Number of successfully redacted JSONL lines written to the session file.

turns.description: Optional count of canonical turns represented by the session. May be absent for formats where the mapping isn't 1:1.

attestation.description: Subset of the canonical attestation record surfaced in the manifest so downstream consumers can see the review posture without a separate artefact.

timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp (UTC) of the attest step that gated this publish.

full_name_scanned.description: Whether the reviewer's full name was scanned against the canonical export.

full_name_matches.description: Number of full-name matches detected during the scan.

manual_sample_count.description: Number of randomly sampled records manually reviewed before publication.

statements_accepted.description: Number of reviewer statements accepted during attest.
